faq.question: What plans is Notion AI available on?
faq.answer: Notion AI is only available on Business and Enterprise Plans, though Free and Plus Plans get a limited number of complimentary AI responses.

faq.question: What is Notion Agent?
faq.answer: Notion Agent is a customizable AI teammate that can take on tasks from start to finish, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create or edit content like pages and databases.

faq.question: How do I use Notion AI to translate a page?
faq.answer: Go to the three-dot menu at the top of the page, select Translate, and Notion AI will translate the page into your desired language.

faq.question: What are the limits for AI image generation in Notion?
faq.answer: During beta, users have a limit of 10 image generations or edits per 24 hours and 30 per 30 days, with limits resetting on a rolling basis.

faq.question: What is Cursor?
faq.answer: Cursor is an AI-native code editor built as a fork of VS Code by Anysphere, embedding AI directly into the editor with features like inline tab completions, Composer for multi-file edits, and background agents on cloud VMs.

faq.question: Is Cursor free?
faq.answer: Yes, Cursor has a free Hobby tier with 2,000 code completions per month and 50 slow premium model requests, but most professional developers upgrade to Pro for unlimited completions and more features.

faq.question: Does Cursor work in JetBrains or Neovim?
faq.answer: No, Cursor is only available as a standalone IDE and does not have plugins for JetBrains, Neovim, Visual Studio, or Xcode.

faq.question: Does Cursor send my code to the cloud?
faq.answer: Yes, Cursor routes code through its own servers to reach the AI model, but you can enable Privacy Mode to prevent code from being stored or used for training.

name: Pearl
tagline: Reinforcement learning library from Meta for production AI.
description: Pearl is a production-ready reinforcement learning agent library developed by Meta's Applied Reinforcement Learning team. It provides tools for building, training, and deploying RL agents in real-world applications, with a focus on scalability and reliability.

name: Prismical
tagline: Build modular XAML apps with MVVM framework
description: Prismical is a framework for creating loosely coupled, maintainable, and testable XAML applications. It supports WPF, Xamarin Forms, and Uno/WinUI platforms, providing MVVM patterns and modular architecture for enterprise-grade development.

name: Scira
tagline: Minimalist AI search that cites every source
description: Scira is a lightweight AI search engine that delivers concise answers with transparent source citations. It integrates into your existing apps, making it easy to find and verify information without leaving your workflow.
features: Integrates with apps you already use

name: screenpipe
tagline: Your private AI memory for everything you see and hear
description: Screenpipe is a local-first AI tool that continuously records your screen and audio, turning your daily activities into searchable memory. It enables you to query past actions, generate SOPs, and automate workflows, all while keeping your data private and secure.
features: Private and secure, no cloud dependency

name: Twenty
tagline: Open-source CRM with AI-native architecture.
description: Twenty is a modern, open-source CRM built for AI integration. It offers modular, scalable customer management with GraphQL and PostgreSQL, designed for teams seeking a flexible alternative to Salesforce.

name: ERPNext
tagline: Open-source ERP for every business vertical
description: ERPNext is a comprehensive, modular ERP system covering accounting, HR, manufacturing, CRM, and more. Built for SMEs and enterprises, it offers a unified platform to manage operations across industries like retail, healthcare, and education.

name: FleetBase
tagline: Open-source logistics OS for end-to-end supply chain
description: Fleetbase is a modular logistics and supply chain operating system that unifies fleet management, warehouse operations, order management, and accounting. It offers self-hosted or cloud deployment with no per-driver fees, making it suitable for businesses of all sizes.
features: Self-hosted or cloud with no per-driver fees
